title: Total Campaign Spending
description: Write a query to calculate the total Campaign_Spending across all rows in book2. Alias the result as Total_Spend.

schema: CREATE TABLE book2 (sno INTEGER, Party_Name TEXT, Contact_Name TEXT, Address TEXT, Campaign_Spending INTEGER)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT SUM(Campaign_Spending) AS Total_Spend FROM book2

schema: CREATE TABLE book2 (sno INTEGER, Party_Name TEXT, Contact_Name TEXT, Address TEXT, Campaign_Spending INTEGER)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT SUM(Campaign_Spending) AS Total_Spend FROM book2
